ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock option */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the underlying stock */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the option */,
  "type_option_type" TEXT /* Type of the option (e.g., OPTSTK CE, OPTSTK PE) */,
  "current_price" REAL /* Current price of the option */,
  "strike_price" REAL /* Strike price of the option */,
  "change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in the option price */,
  "open_interest" INTEGER /* Open interest of the option */,
  "change_in_oi" INTEGER /* Change in open interest */,
  "change_percentage_oi" REAL /* Percentage change in open interest */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the option */,
  "implied_volatility" REAL /* Implied volatility of the option */,
  "last_trade_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last trade */,
  "bid_price" REAL /* Highest price a buyer is willing to pay for the option */,
  "ask_price" REAL /* Lowest price a seller is willing to accept for the option */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_options_type_option_type FOREIGN KEY ("type_option_type") REFERENCES option_types ("type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_options_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES symbols ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "symbols" (
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock symbol */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry sector of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the company is listed */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is headquartered */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Broader financial sector */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "option_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each option type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the option type (e.g., CE, PE) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the option type (Call, Put) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password for security */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number for contact purposes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON column to store role-specific permissions */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the users table */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the user_roles table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was assigned */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data entry */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the stock_options table */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the historical data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the option */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the option on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the option on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the option */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the option */,
  "open_interest" INTEGER /* Open interest of the option */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES stock_options ("option_id")
)
